All clean. Here's a summary of what was done:

---

### Changes Made

**5 new files created:**

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `Directory.Build.props` | 8 shared properties (TFM, nullability, warnings, company info) — applied to all projects |
| `src/Directory.Build.props` | Src-only: XML doc generation + CS1591 suppression |
| `test/Directory.Build.props` | Test-only: `IsPackable=false` + common test framework packages |
| `Directory.Build.targets` | Shared `PrintBuildInfo` target (was copy-pasted in 3 projects) |
| `Directory.Packages.props` | **Central Package Management** — all versions in one place |

**5 csproj files slimmed down** — each now contains only its unique SDK, package refs, and project refs. Test projects are ~4 lines each.

### Version Drift Fixed
Standardized on the highest version where projects disagreed:
